perturbation.original_text: B. Payment Terms. Wade Product Royalties described above in Section 8A will be paid on a quarterly basis on the first day of each of the months of July, October, January, and April and shall be accompanied by backup documentation reasonably satisfactory to Wade.
perturbation.changed_text: B. Payment Terms. Wade Product Royalties described above in Section 8A will be paid on a quarterly basis on the fifteenth day of each of the months of July, October, January, and April and shall be accompanied by backup documentation reasonably satisfactory to Wade.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction by changing the payment date of the royalties to the fifteenth day of the specified months, while section 8.B. states that the payment date is the first day of those months. This leads to uncertainty and potential dispute over when the royalty payments are actually due.
perturbation.contradicted_text: B. Payment Terms. Wade Product Royalties described above in Section 8A will be paid on a quarterly basis on the first day of each of the months of July, October, January, and April and shall be accompanied by backup documentation reasonably satisfactory to Wade.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the payment date from the first day of the month to the fifteenth day of the month. The contradicted text states the payment date is the first day. Therefore, the changed text creates a direct contradiction regarding the payment date, leading to potential disputes.

perturbation.original_text: A. Naked shall have the right to terminate this Agreement upon ten (10) days prior written notice to Wade in the event Wade fails to perform the Wade Services or breaches any other covenant or agreement set forth herein (including the essence of this Agreement), and fails to cure same (if curable) within seven (7) days of receipt of written notice. Such termination shall relieve Naked of its obligation to provide any further consideration pursuant to this Agreement provided that Wade shall retain all warrants he has received hereunder that have vested as of the date of such termination. In the event of such termination as a result of a material breach of this Agreement by Wade (i) Wade's contractual liabilities and obligations until the date of termination still exist notwithstanding such termination, (ii) Naked shall be under no obligation to sell any Wade Products but shall nevertheless owe the Royalty on any Wade Products sold; and (iii) notwithstanding anything to the contrary herein, Wade shall forfeit all warrants he has received hereunder.
perturbation.changed_text: A. Naked shall have the right to terminate this Agreement upon ten (10) days prior written notice to Wade in the event Wade fails to perform the Wade Services or breaches any other covenant or agreement set forth herein (including the essence of this Agreement), and fails to cure same (if curable) within twenty (20) days of receipt of written notice. Such termination shall relieve Naked of its obligation to provide any further consideration pursuant to this Agreement provided that Wade shall retain all warrants he has received hereunder that have vested as of the date of such termination. In the event of such termination as a result of a material breach of this Agreement by Wade (i) Wade's contractual liabilities and obligations until the date of termination still exist notwithstanding such termination, (ii) Naked shall be under no obligation to sell any Wade Products but shall nevertheless owe the Royalty on any Wade Products sold; and (iii) notwithstanding anything to the contrary herein, Wade shall forfeit all warrants he has received hereunder.
perturbation.explanation: The modification extends the cure period from seven (7) days to twenty (20) days. This directly contradicts the original seven (7) day cure period established in Section 12.A, introducing uncertainty about the actual time Wade has to rectify a breach before termination is enacted by Naked.
perturbation.contradicted_text: A. Naked shall have the right to terminate this Agreement upon ten (10) days prior written notice to Wade in the event Wade fails to perform the Wade Services or breaches any other covenant or agreement set forth herein (including the essence of this Agreement), and fails to cure same (if curable) within seven (7) days of receipt of written notice. Such termination shall relieve Naked of its obligation to provide any further consideration pursuant to this Agreement provided that Wade shall retain all warrants he has received hereunder that have vested as of the date of such termination. In the event of such termination as a result of a material breach of this Agreement by Wade (i) Wade's contractual liabilities and obligations until the date of termination still exist notwithstanding such termination, (ii) Naked shall be under no obligation to sell any Wade Products but shall nevertheless owe the Royalty on any Wade Products sold; and (iii) notwithstanding anything to the contrary herein, Wade shall forfeit all warrants he has received hereunder.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the cure period from seven (7) days to twenty (20) days. The contradicted text (which is the same as the original text) states the cure period is seven (7) days. This creates a direct and irreconcilable contradiction regarding the time allowed to cure a breach, leading to uncertainty and potential disputes. The change directly violates the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition, as different sections now provide conflicting deadlines.

perturbation.original_text: Wade will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with Wade Image including, for the avoidance of doubt, the Logo. For the avoidance of doubt, no rights are being granted hereunder to any intellectual property belonging to the NBA or its member clubs (including but not limited to the Miami Heat). Subject to Section 14A, Naked will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with the Naked Products, the Naked brand and any and all related brands. All advertising material produced hereunder will be and remain the absolute property of Naked.
perturbation.changed_text: Wade will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with Wade Image including, for the avoidance of doubt, the Logo. For the avoidance of doubt, no rights are being granted hereunder to any intellectual property belonging to the NBA or its member clubs (including but not limited to the Miami Heat). Subject to Section 14A, Naked will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with the Naked Products, the Naked brand and any and all related brands. All advertising material produced hereunder will be the joint property of Naked and Wade.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction by stating that the advertising material produced under the agreement is the joint property of Naked and Wade, while the next sentence in the original agreement says the advertising material is the absolute property of Naked. This contradiction creates uncertainty about who owns the advertising material, leading to potential disputes.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Wade will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with Wade Image including, for the avoidance of doubt, the Logo. For the avoidance of doubt, no rights are being granted hereunder to any intellectual property belonging to the NBA or its member clubs (including but not limited to the Miami Heat). Subject to Section 14A, Naked will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with the Naked Products, the Naked brand and any and all related brands. All advertising material produced hereunder will be and remain the absolute property of Naked. Wade acknowledges that he does not now have and in the future will assert no right, title or interest of any kind or nature whatsoever therein, or in or to any component part or tape, dub or copy or element or character or characterization thereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original text. The original text states that 'All advertising material produced hereunder will be and remain the absolute property of Naked,' whereas the changed text states that the same advertising material 'will be the joint property of Naked and Wade.' This creates a clear and direct conflict regarding the ownership of the advertising material, leading to an in-text contradiction.
